ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to or did end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Completed, On going, Pending) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead responsible for the project */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region where the project is being executed */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Current risk level of the project (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_lead_id") REFERENCES project_leads ("project_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_leads" (
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project lead */,
  "lead_name" TEXT /* Full name of the project lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the project lead */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the project lead belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the project lead */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the project lead within the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project lead was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project lead's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the milestone is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the milestone (e.g., Completed, Not Started, In Progress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the milestone */,
  "responsible_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for the milestone */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Current risk level of the milestone (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the milestone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "assigned_to" TEXT /* User assigned to the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the task is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., Completed, Not Started, In Progress) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the task */,
  "responsible_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for the task */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Current risk level of the task (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the expense belongs to */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., Materials, Labor, Travel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "reimbursed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the expense has been reimbursed */,
  "reimbursed_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was reimbursed */,
  "reimbursed_by" TEXT /* User who processed the reimbursement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the expense was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, team member, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the user within the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the update belongs to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Completed, On going, Pending) */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the status update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the update */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Current risk level of the project at the time of the update (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
